The '''Rethin Sea''' was the name of the liquid [[Rethen/Legends|rethin]] (also known as "rethen") metal core of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>. During the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince|Trioculus affair]], the Empire constructed a factory barge above the sea to harvest metals and [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] and produce material. A by-product of the factory was [[braze]] (a contraction of "brown haze"), which heavily polluted Bespin's atmosphere.

{{Nature-stub}}
